series_metadata.series_title: OSHA Incident Reports, Logs, and Annual Summaries
series_metadata.series_description: This series contains reports of incidents (OSHA 301), OSHA Logs (OSHA 300), and annual summaries related to employee work-related illnesses, injuries, and deaths. Records are entered and maintained in the ODPS HR/PeopleSoft system.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: current, five years in HR/PeopleSoft and ERIS systems. Reports relating or indicating employee exposure toxic or harmful substances or physical agents shall be retained from date of employee''s separation
